description: This class holds the staging data required to define 3D geometry before it is passed to the Script POP for final construction. It supports defining primitives as well as point, vertex, and primitive attribute data. Attribute values can be appended directly or populated by copying from existing POP buffers. Likewise, new primitives may be appended, or an entire primitive buffer can be copied from another POP instance. See also: POP Class, ScriptPOP Class, AttribList Class

members.name: pointAttributeValues
members.description: A dictionary mapping each attribute name to an AttribList of staged point attribute values.

members.name: primAttributeValues
members.description: A dictionary mapping each attribute name to an AttribList of staged primitive attribute values.

members.name: vertAttributeValues
members.description: A dictionary mapping each attribute name to an AttribList of staged vertex attribute values.

methods.name: allocatePointAttribValues
methods.description: Allocates multiple point attribute values. Returns a dictionary of AttribList per attribute name. * `numValues` - The number of values to allocate.

methods.name: allocatePrimAttribValues
methods.description: Allocates multiple primitive attribute values. Returns a dictionary of AttribList per attribute name. * `numValues` - The number of values to allocate.

methods.name: allocateVertAttribValues
methods.description: Allocates multiple vertex attribute values. Returns a dictionary of AttribList per attribute name. * `numValues` - The number of values to allocate.

methods.name: appendDimension
methods.description: Adds a dimension to the metadata to describe the point list's structure. * `dimensionSize` - The dimension size.

methods.name: appendPointAttribValue
methods.description: Adds a point attribute element. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `value` - The value or a tuple of components, columns and array values.

methods.name: appendPointAttribValues
methods.description: Adds multiple point attribute elements. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `values` - The list of values to add. Elements in the list can be float, int or tuples.

methods.name: appendPrimAttribValue
methods.description: Adds a primitive attribute element. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `value` - The value or a tuple of components, columns and array values.

methods.name: appendPrimAttribValues
methods.description: Adds multiple primitive attribute elements. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `values` - The list of values to add. Elements in the list can be float, int or tuples.

methods.name: appendPrimLine
methods.description: Adds a line primitive. * `pointIndex0` - The point index 0. * `pointIndex1` - The point index 1.

methods.name: appendPrimLineStrip
methods.description: Adds a line strip primitive. * `pointIndices` - The tuple containing the point indices.

methods.name: appendPrimLineStrips
methods.description: Adds a line strip primitive. * `pointIndices` - A list of tuples of point indices.

methods.name: appendPrimLines
methods.description: Adds multiple line primitives. * `pointIndices` - A list of point indices.

methods.name: appendPrimPoint
methods.description: Adds a point primitive. * `pointIndex` - The point index.

methods.name: appendPrimPoints
methods.description: Adds multiple point primitives. * `pointIndices` - A list of point indices.

methods.name: appendPrimQuad
methods.description: Adds a quadrilateral primitive. * `pointIndex0` - The point index 0. * `pointIndex1` - The point index 1. * `pointIndex2` - The point index 2. * `pointIndex3` - The point index 3.

methods.name: appendPrimQuads
methods.description: Adds a quadrilateral primitive. * `pointIndices` - A list of point indices.

methods.name: appendPrimTriangle
methods.description: Adds a triangle primitive. * `pointIndex0` - The point index 0. * `pointIndex1` - The point index 1. * `pointIndex2` - The point index 2.

methods.name: appendPrimTriangles
methods.description: Adds multiple triangle primitives. * `pointIndices` - A list of point indices.

methods.name: appendVertAttribValue
methods.description: Adds a vertex attribute element. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `value` - The value or a tuple of components, columns and array values.

methods.name: appendVertAttribValues
methods.description: Adds multiple vertex attribute elements. Returns the total number of elements. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `values` - The list of values to add. Elements in the list can be float, int or tuples.

methods.name: clear
methods.description: Clears the staging data.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Copies the GPU POP attributes values and primitive indices to the staging GPU buffers. * `pop` - The POP to copy the information from.

methods.name: copyPointAttribBuffer
methods.description: Copies a POP attribute buffer to a staging data buffer. * `pop` The POP to copy the buffer from. * `attributeName` - The POP's attribute name. * `stagingAttributeName` - (Keyword, Optional) The staging attribute name.

methods.name: copyPrimAttribBuffer
methods.description: Copies a POP attribute buffer to a staging data buffer. * `pop` The POP to copy the buffer from. * `attributeName` - The POP's attribute name. * `stagingAttributeName` - (Keyword, Optional) The staging attribute name.

methods.name: copyPrims
methods.description: Copies the GPU primitives index buffers. * `pop` - The POP to copy the information from.

methods.name: copyVertAttribBuffer
methods.description: Copies a POP attribute buffer to a staging data buffer. * `pop` The POP to copy the buffer from. * `attributeName` - The POP's attribute name. * `stagingAttributeName` - (Keyword, Optional) The staging attribute name.

methods.name: download
methods.description: Copies a POP attributes values and primitives indices. * `pop` - The POP to download the information from. * `delayed` - (Keyword, Optional) If set to True, the download results will be delayed, avoiding stalling the GPU waiting for the result immediately.

methods.name: createPointAttrib
methods.signature: createPointAttribcreatePointAttrib(attributeName, numComps=1, numMatRows=1, numMatCols=1, arrSize=1, type=AttribDataType.FLOAT32, qualifier=AttribQualifier.NONE)
methods.description: Creates a point attribute. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `numComps` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of components. * `numMatRows` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix rows. * `numMatCols` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix columns. * `arrSize` - (Keyword, Optional) Specifies the maximum number of elements allowed in the array. A value of 0 (or leaving it unset) indicates the attribute is a single, non-array value. * `type` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute data type. * `qualifier` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute qualifier. * `defaultValue` - (Keyword, Optional) A tuple with a maximun of 4 elements to set the default components values.

methods.name: createPrimAttrib
methods.signature: createPrimAttribcreatePrimAttrib(attributeName, numComps=1, numMatRows=1,, numMatCols=1, isArray=False, arrSize=1, type=AttribDataType.FLOAT32, qualifier=AttribQualifier.NONE)
methods.description: Creates a primitive attribute. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `numComps` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of components. * `numMatRows` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix rows. * `numMatCols` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix columns. * `arrSize` - (Keyword, Optional) Specifies the maximum number of elements allowed in the array. A value of 0 (or leaving it unset) indicates the attribute is a single, non-array value. * `type` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute data type. * `qualifier` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute qualifier. * `defaultValue` - (Keyword, Optional) A tuple with a maximun of 4 elements to set the default components values.

methods.name: createVertAttrib
methods.signature: createVertAttribcreateVertAttrib(attributeName, numComps=1, numMatRows=1, numMatCols=1, arrSize=1, type=AttribDataType.FLOAT32, qualifier=AttribQualifier.NONE)
methods.description: Creates a vertex attribute. * `attributeName` - The attribute name. * `numComps` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of components. * `numMatRows` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix rows. * `numMatCols` - (Keyword, Optional) The number of matrix columns. * `arrSize` - (Keyword, Optional) Specifies the maximum number of elements allowed in the array. A value of 0 (or leaving it unset) indicates the attribute is a single, non-array value. * `type` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute data type. (AttribDataType.FLOAT32, AttribDataType.FLOAT64, AttribDataType.INT32, AttribDataType.UINT32) * `qualifier` - (Keyword, Optional) The attribute qualifier. (AttribQualifier.NONE, AttribQualifier.NONE, AttribQualifier.DIRECTION, AttribQualifier.TRANSFORM_MATRIX, AttribQualifier.COLOR, AttribQualifier.QUATERNION) * `defaultValue` - (Keyword, Optional) A tuple with a maximun of 4 elements to set the default components values.
